CVE-2022-28805.title: singlevar in lparser.c in Lua from (including) 5.4.0 up to (exclu ...
CVE-2022-28805.description: singlevar in lparser.c in Lua from (including) 5.4.0 up to (excluding) 5.4.4 lacks a certain luaK_exp2anyregup call, leading to a heap-based buffer over-read that might affect a system that compiles untrusted Lua code.
CVE-2022-28805.notes: The installed package version includes the fixes for this vulnerability. If this vulnerability is reported by a scanning tool, it is a false positive.

CVE-2022-33099.title: An issue in the component luaG_runerror of Lua v5.4.4 and below l ...
CVE-2022-33099.description: An issue in the component luaG_runerror of Lua v5.4.4 and below leads to a heap-buffer overflow when a recursive error occurs.
CVE-2022-33099.notes: The installed package version includes the fixes for this vulnerability. If this vulnerability is reported by a scanning tool, it is a false positive.
